<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Reporting Cadence

## Scheduled Reports

| Report | Schedule | Format | Notes |
|--------|----------|--------|-------|
| **Boss Weekly** | Every Monday | Report | Executive summary |
| **Leader Weekly** | Every Friday | Report | Detailed operational review |
| **Noah GEO Weekly** | Every Monday | Dashboard + Report | Fresh AI platform test data |
| **Sean Weekly** | Every Friday | Report | Blog publishing + SEO metrics |
| **Team Weekly** | Saturday EST 8:00 (= Beijing 20:00) | Group message | Since 2026-03-17 |
| **Inquiry Notification** | Real-time | Group message | Triggered per new inquiry |

## Team Weekly Report (Permanent — Since 2026-03-17)

- **Time**: US Eastern Saturday 8:00 AM = Beijing Saturday 20:00
- **Format**: Group chat message
- **Content**: This week's work summary per role + **next week's plan**
- Organized by team role, structured presentation, includes OKR progress

## Dual-Timezone Daily Report (Permanent — Since 2026-03-17)

Two reports per day, sent as group chat messages (not dashboards or documents).

### Beijing Time 20:00

- **Cron ID**: hwbd4r3o
- **Covers**: 08:00 - 20:00 Beijing time (China daytime work)

### US Eastern 20:00 = Beijing 08:00

- **Cron ID**: l0895kbn
- **Covers**: 20:00 - 08:00 Beijing time (US daytime work)

Each report covers the window from the previous checkpoint to the current one.

### Daily Report Format (5 Sections)

Organized by team role. Only list roles that had activity — skip silent roles.

| Section | Content |
|---------|---------|
| **1. Key Progress** | Completed milestones and deliverables |
| **2. In Progress** | Active work items |
| **3. Blockers / Needs Support** | Issues requiring attention |
| **4. Decisions / Insights** | Notable decisions made or insights discovered |
| **5. Reminders** | Upcoming deadlines or action items |

### Daily Report Principles

- **Concise and structured** — no stream-of-consciousness recaps
- Let both timezone teams quickly grasp key progress without scrolling through chat history
- Roles with no activity are omitted entirely
